sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_graphs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph_a TEXT, graph_b TEXT);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(graph_a, graph_b) AS graph_diff FROM rdf_graphs WHERE bif:contains(graph_a, '<http://example.org/subject1>') AND graph_a IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM rdf_graphs WHERE bif:contains(graph_b, '<http://example.org/subject2>') AND DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(graph_a, graph_b) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(graph_a, graph_b) AS graph_diff FROM rdf_graphs WHERE graph_a IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
CREATE TABLE tmp_null_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph TEXT);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(NULL, graph) AS graph_diff FROM tmp_null_test WHERE bif:contains(graph, '<http://example.org/subject3>') OR graph IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE multi_join_test (id1 INT, graph TEXT, id2 INT);

SELECT m1.id1, DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(m1.graph, m2.graph) AS graph_diff FROM multi_join_test m1 JOIN multi_join_test m2 ON m1.id2 = m2.id2 WHERE bif:contains(m1.graph, 'graphX') AND m2.graph IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id, DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(graph_a, graph_b) FROM rdf_graphs GROUP BY graph_a HAVING MAX(id) > 0;
